name: Mexican Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine softened cream cheese and shredded cheddar cheese in a bowl and beat until fluffy.
2. Add 1 cup of sour cream and taco seasonings to the mixture. Beat in eggs one at a time.
3. Fold in chopped and drained chilies.
4. Pour the batter into a prepared springform pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes, or until set.
6. Let cool for 10 minutes.
7. Top with remaining sour cream. Return to oven for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Allow to cool completely before serving.
9. Before serving, spread the drained salsa on top and serve with your favorite crackers or chips.
